title: CBIC Facilitates International Transhipment of Cargo from All Ports
content:
# CBIC Facilitates International Transhipment of Cargo from All Ports

Ek important update hai! Government ne international transhipment of cargo ko facilitate karne ke liye naye guidelines announce kiye hain. Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne Circular No. 15/2026-Customs dated March 27, 2026, issue kiya hai.

Yeh circular mainly maritime routes mein disruptions ke kaaran utpann hone wale logistical challenges ko address karne ke liye laya gaya hai, khaaskar Strait of Hormuz ke closure ki wajah se.

**Key Highlights:**

*   **Universal Transhipment Access:** Ab Full Container Load (FCL) aur Less than Container Load (LCL) cargo ka international transhipment India ke sabhi seaports aur international airports se allow kiya jayega.
*   **Legal Basis:** CBIC ne Customs Act, 1962 ke Section 143AA ki powers ka upyog karte hue yeh facilitation provide kiya hai.
*   **Purpose:** Iska maksad supply chain gridlock ko rokna aur exporters ke liye suvidha badhana hai, jo congested primary transhipment hubs par vessels ke wait time ko kam karega.
*   **Nodal Officers:** Har Customs Zone mein Nodal Officer designate kiye jayenge (Additional/Joint Commissioner rank ke), jo transhipment requests ko priority par process karenge aur approvals facilitate karenge.
*   **Simplified Procedure:** Circular mein multiple Customs stations ke through transhipment ke liye simplified procedures bhi provide kiye gaye hain, jisme Nodal Officers ke beech prior consent aur proper Customs control shamil hai.
*   **Stranded Cargo Relief:** Export consignments jo gateway ports par disruptions ki wajah se फंसे hue hain, unhe exporter ke request par return ya re-route karne ki anumati di jayegi, bina containers ko originating Inland Container Depot (ICD) par physical return kiye.
*   **Temporary Measure:** Yeh suvidha aur relaxations filhaal 15 April, 2026 tak lagu rahenge.

Yeh move trade ko smooth rakhne aur exporters ko current global shipping challenges se cope karne mein madad karega.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in/)

*Published on: 29 March 2026*
